home.title: Information Technology
home.subtitle: Secondary Industrial School of Transport, a.s.
home.description: Four-year matriculation study focused on programming, system administration, and computer networks. Faculty school of the Faculty of Transportation at CTU in Prague.
home.badge: Faculty School of the Faculty of Transportation at CTU

grid.title: What You'll Learn
grid.subtitle: Overview of our projects and technologies for 2026

about.title: About the Information Technology Program
about.subtitle: Secondary Industrial School of Transport - modern education in IT
about.description1: Information Technology is a four-year matriculation program that prepares students for careers in the fast-evolving world of IT. The curriculum combines solid theoretical foundations with a strong emphasis on practical skills students can apply in real projects.
about.description2: Graduates are ready both for direct entry into the workforce and for continued studies at technical universities.
about.whyDesc: Our program combines modern equipment, real-world practice, and experienced teachers. We focus on making sure students leave prepared not only in theory, but especially in practice.

modernEquipment.title: Modern equipment
modernEquipment.description: Work with current hardware, professional tools, and technologies used in industry.

companiesPractice.title: Practice in companies
companiesPractice.description: Gain hands-on experience directly in companies and explore the real working environment already during your studies.

experiencedTeachers.title: Experienced teachers
experiencedTeachers.description: Classes led by teachers with practical IT experience and up-to-date industry knowledge.

hero.title: Technology that will
hero.subtitle: The Information Technology program is a four-year matriculation program focused on programming, computer networks, cybersecurity, and modern web technologies. With us, you don't just learn theory — you work with what's actually used in the industry.
hero.feature1Desc: Python, TypeScript, networks, Linux, Docker, databases.
hero.feature2Desc: Professional internships and collaboration with real companies where you'll work on actual projects.
hero.feature3Desc: Hackathons, matriculation projects, and real-world assignments that prepare you for the real IT world.
